title: papaver somniferum var. leucum
intro: Papaver somniferum var. leucum, also known as opium poppy white, is a variety of the opium poppy plant (Papaver somniferum) native to the Mediterranean region. The plant contains medicinal properties including alkaloids such as morphine and codeine, which have been used to relieve pain and induce sleep. The health benefits of Papaver somniferum var. leucum include its use in reducing inflammation and treating coughs, as well as its potential role in managing chronic pain and anxiety. Herbal preparations of the plant include tinctures and extracts, although the use of these preparations should be done under the guidance of a medical professional due to the plant's potential for abuse and addiction.
